Home/Pricing

What it costs

Fixed outcomes. No surprise hours.

You are buying a governed loop and the proof that ships with it — not a retainer that invoices for "alignment sessions."

Platform · Buyer 1

Governed Runtime Service

From $2K/mo

  • Policy gate PASS/BLOCK before every AI call
  • Signed receipt on every response
  • Profile: governance · agency · finance
  • Weekly proof export · replay on disk
  • Wrapper fee — not raw token resale

Governed Claude · compliant GPT — the layer Anthropic does not sell

See live proof →

Ops Health Audit

$750 one-time

  • 48-hour spine review
  • Board-ready PDF report
  • Clear path to a full build
Book audit
Agencies start here

Agent Loop Build

$3–10K project

  • One governed loop live in 2–3 weeks
  • Handoff doc + live replay demo
  • 30-day fix window included
  • 50% deposit · approval-gated scope

50% to start · balance when your loop passes on disk

Start build

Retainer

from $2K / month

  • Weekly proof export for clients
  • Changes gated by your approval
  • Self-healing monitor on the loop
  • Expansion band $2–5K/mo typical
Talk retainer

What you get in handoff

  • Receipt bundle — ALLOW/BLOCK records on disk with policy version and timestamp
  • Replay link — screen-share script your client can re-run without chat history
  • Weekly export path — HTML/PDF proof export for retainer expansion
  • Handoff doc — scope, deposit terms, 30-day fix window, approval gates

* Illustrative timeline and pricing bands — final scope confirmed on discovery call.

What you get in every plan

The same governance spine we run on our own factory — session gate, allow/block at dispatch, export bundle, replay demo. Your buyer sees proof, not architecture slides.

Evaluate first with sourcea-boot — README in under five minutes, PASS or BLOCK in the report. Platform procurement: download pack · security overview.

Typical timeline

2–3 weeks to first live loop
~$200/mo to run the factory
<5 min to screen-share proof
